query:
SELECT id, name, instagram, phone, hours IS NOT NULL as has_hours, rating
FROM establishments 
WHERE categoryId = (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Boteco Moderno')
ORDER BY id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, instagram, phone, hours IS NOT NULL as has_hours, rating
FROM establishments 
WHERE categoryId = (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Boteco Moderno')
ORDER BY id;
